title: Verify the 'Pause Trial' flow and subsequent content locking
description: Tests the user's ability to pause their trial and confirms that the UI state and content access are updated correctly.
preconditions: User is on the 'Trial Corner' hub page.

steps.description: 2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Pause Anyway & Lose Access'.
3. Verify the trial is now paused.
4. Navigate to the homepage and verify the widget has updated to the 'Paused' design.
5. Navigate back to the Trial Corner hub.
6. Verify all content sections (Engagement, Trending, etc.) are locked and display a message indicating the trial is paused.

expected_result: The trial status changes to paused. The homepage widget and Trial Corner UI update to reflect this paused state, and access to premium content is blocked.
